homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 0
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This recording features a lively and energetic violin solo, identified as a practice session of Paganini's Caprice No. 5. The fast-paced performance is characterized by its spirited tone, intricate melodies, and vibrant rhythmic drive typical of classical virtuosity. While the execution feels informal due to the nature of a rehearsal, the piece maintains a dynamic and engaging atmosphere throughout.

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This segment is an intense and passionate instrumental rock track featuring a driving rhythm section of electric guitars, bass, and acoustic drums. A prominent guitar solo and strong riff create a powerful sound that feels perfectly suited for a high-energy live concert or a dramatic movie scene. The music maintains a steady tempo throughout, emphasizing the core rock instruments without any vocals to enhance the overall energy.

Although musical metadata suggests some rock influences, the segment's core identity remains rooted in its rhythmic Latin style.
